Face drift on leather-jacket-street output. Root causes: (1) 4 body refs diluted face-lock signal (max should be 2), (2) beach + pool body refs had brown hair overriding platinum blonde, (3) cream-dress and red-leather body refs showed partial chin/jaw causing face-blend. Fix: NanoBanana now auto-trims to 3 refs max, prepends face-lock priority instruction, skips brand injection when ref-image present, appends character never-list.

After fix: face consistency held across 6/8 images. Cream dress city, red leather rooftop, beach bikini, cozy sweater, cafe polkadot, balcony lace — all maintained platinum blonde, blue-green eyes, warm smile. Only 1 of 8 (athleisure trail) had slight drift.
